content:
🚀 yopass | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely sharing sensitive information like passwords and secrets through a one-time, expiring link, accessible via a web interface or CLI.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-End encryption using OpenPGP • Secrets can only be viewed once • No accounts or user management required • Secrets self destruct after X hours • Custom password option
📖 Summary: Yopass is a tool for securely sharing secrets, passwords, and files. It utilizes end-to-end encryption in the browser, ensuring that the decryption key is never sent to the server. Secrets are one-time viewable and self-destruct after a set period, minimizing sensitive information exposure in insecure channels.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
